title: Design AI customer-support agent + DSA review
focus: Tool catalog; escalation policy; quality eval offline/online.

tracks.label: ML System Design · AI customer-support agent

items.label: Design an AI customer-support agent
interviewQuestions: Walk me through designing an LLM-based customer-support agent for a fintech.
How would you decide when to escalate to a human?
How do you measure ticket resolution quality offline and online?

items.label: Tool catalog & guardrails
interviewQuestions: What tools would you give the agent (account lookup, refund, ticket create) and what guardrails?
How would you scope a 'refund' tool so the agent can't accidentally refund $1M instead of $100?
